voice.tone: Technical and precise. Speaks to AI engineers and prompt designers.
voice.errors: Diagnostic and developer-friendly. Include error codes, stack context, and suggested fixes. Link to documentation when available.
voice.loading: Skeleton panes with blinking cursor placeholders in monospace fields. Split panels show loading shimmer. Progress bars for long operations.
voice.empty_states: IDE-style emptiness. An empty workspace should guide the user to create their first agent with a clear setup wizard. Minimal and purposeful.
